deposit_event_description: Backfilled deposit_event for SES-073. Records (SES-073, DEC-226, PI-049, WT-046, 7 reference edges) were written via direct POSTs from /tmp/write_pi045_dead_end_records.py to dogfood the v0.7 database-backed kickoff pattern, rather than via scripts/apply_close_out.py. This deposit_event retroactively closes the audit chain — same shape as PI-026 Phase 4's 24-payload sweep applied to a single conversation. Records summary: 1 session, 1 decision, 1 planning item, 1 work_ticket, 7 references.
Applied COP-073. Outcome: failure at step work_tickets. Records written before failure: no records written.
